title: Statues Classic
description: Allows creating posable statues of players from most blocks.
body:
Statues Classic is a re-creation of AUTOMATIC_MAIDEN / asie's 1.6/1.7 Statues mod. It allows creating posable statues of players from most blocks, which can be equipped with items and armour, given name tags, capes* and even banners!

*Capes can be shown on statues only if the statued player has an official cape active

This mod requires [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api), [Fabric Language Kotlin](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-language-kotlin) and [MarderLib](https://modrinth.com/mod/marderlib)

![Statues](https://cdn-raw.modrinth.com/data/h8oesrKe/images/105b14418af5b11e08906fce239055d4212bf460.png)

To create a statue, make a pillar of two (identical) blocks and use a Statue Hammer on them. This will open a UI that lets you enter a username and pose the statue.
Statues look like the block used to create them and if that block emits light, the statue will too.

You can also
- Give statues items and armour. Blocks and banners can be added to the head slot.
- Click with paper on a statue to display a nametag.
- Click with a Palette to colourize a statue, like the player's actual skin.
- Click with leather to add a cape.
- Use glowstone dust to make a statue emit light, or gunpowder to stop it from doing so.

All recipes are included in the vanilla recipe book.

Known Incompatibilities:
- CustomSkinLoader - Statues are invisible. - Fabric Tailor is a possible alternative.
- 3d Skin Layers - The mod will work, but statue skins will not be changed.
- Ears - Ears/Tails will not appear on statues. This will be fixed sometime soon(tm)
